violations.text: Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (milk) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Proper storage reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Water was observed overflowing and draining onto floor. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Walk-in to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

The floors in the various locations have an small accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
The ceiling tiles were observed with water damage. Tiles to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
The hand-washing sink in the employee bathroom was lacking paper towels. Drying provision supplied at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

Raw animal foods such as eggs were observed stored above beverage items in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. (Eggs are to be relocated to the bottom shelf.) New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The Walk-In Cooler Door was observed to be not sealing tightly shut. When fully closed, the door stays slightly ajar. Equipment is to be maintained in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

At the time of inspection, the following areas of the physical facilities were observed to be in poor repair... - The ceiling was observed to be dripping in the retail area. Per the PIC, the ceiling had a leak during the recent rain storm (The roof has already been repaired). Dripping water is to be contained to prevent possible contamination of food and beverage products. (The food and beverage products on shelving near dripping are to be relocated to prevent possible contamination.) - Ceiling tiles were observed to be stained/wet (Per the PIC from recent roof leak) - Light shields were observed to be stained and holding water (Per the PIC from recent roof leak) Per the PIC, roof was repaired since previous rain event. Ceiling tiles and light shields are to be replaced. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
